page_metadata.biotools__summary:
An In-Silico Alternative to Animal Testing for Acute Systemic and TOPical TOXicity.

The STopTox app is a fast, reliable, and user-friendly tool available as an alternative method for assessing the potential of chemicals to cause acute toxicity.
